title: How the current Town Board was elected
intro: How many actual votes put each current Riverhead Town Board member in office — and how that compares to the town's total population and its registered voters. A low share isn't an accusation; it's the normal reality of low-turnout local elections, and a useful reminder of how few votes decide who controls the Town's budget.

denominators.populationSource: U.S. Census Bureau, 2020 Census — Town of Riverhead population 35,902.
denominators.registeredVotersSource: Suffolk County Board of Elections, active registered voters in the Town of Riverhead as of the November 2025 election (~24,217).

note: Vote counts are the winning candidate's own total, from the Suffolk County Board of Elections' final certified results (including the 2025 supervisor recount). The registered-voter denominator is the November 2025 figure; the 2023 winners are compared against it as an approximate reference, since the exact 2023 roll differed slightly. Percentages are the winner's votes divided by each denominator — not a turnout rate.

members.name: Jerome (Jerry) Halpin
members.result: Defeated incumbent Tim Hubbard 3,958 to 3,921 — a 37-vote margin that held through a full manual recount.

members.name: Robert "Bob" Kern
members.result: Re-elected to a three-year term; his 3,958 votes were the highest total in any Riverhead race that year.

members.name: Kenneth Rothwell
members.result: Re-elected to a three-year term, defeating Democrat Mark Woolley 3,882 to 3,824 — a 58-vote margin.

members.name: Joann Waski
members.result: Won one of two open council seats with 4,875 votes (29.2%) in a four-way race.

members.name: Denise Merrifield
members.result: Top vote-getter for the two open council seats with 4,992 votes (29.9%) in a four-way race.

sources: RiverheadLOCAL, “Halpin wins supervisor race by 37 votes: final results announced by Suffolk Board of Elections” (Nov. 25, 2025).
RiverheadLOCAL / Riverhead News-Review 2025 town council results (Kern, Rothwell vote totals).
RiverheadLOCAL, “Republicans sweep in Riverhead town races” (Nov. 7, 2023) — Waski and Merrifield council totals.
Suffolk County Board of Elections, Election Results (suffolkcountyny.gov/Departments/BOE/Election-Results).
U.S. Census Bureau, 2020 Census — Town of Riverhead.
